how.label: Process
how.descripcion: In four steps, transform an informal labor relationship into a transparent digital contract.

01.title: Create your profile
01.description: Register as an employer or worker. Set up your profile with your country's details.

02.title: Define the contract
02.description: The employer configures the terms according to local legislation. The worker signs digitally.

03.title: Manage day to day
03.description: Record attendance, upload payments and receive automatic alerts. All in real time.

04.title: Build your history
04.description: The worker accumulates a verified work profile that follows them to any country.
